# arif-fazil.com — Human Sovereign Anchor for arifOS Constellation
> Role: Identity anchor, constitutional architect, exploration geoscientist
> URL: https://arif-fazil.com
> MCP: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com
> Playground: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/#playground
> Canonical identity: https://arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
> Constitutional canon: https://apex.arif-fazil.com
> Full context: https://arif-fazil.com/full-context.json
> Source: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
> Sealed: true
> Epoch: 2026-04-20

## Human Identity
Muhammad Arif bin Fazil (Arif Fazil) is a Senior Exploration Geoscientist based in Malaysia, practising in offshore basins including the Malay Basin. He is also the architect of arifOS — a constitutional kernel for governed AI systems.

## arifOS Constitutional Framework
arifOS enforces 13 constitutional floors (F1–F13) on all AI-to-tool interactions:
- F1 Amanah: Reversibility lock — no irreversible action without human approval
- F2 Truth: Anti-hallucination — ungrounded claims → VOID
- F3 Tri-Witness: Consensus — W³ ≥ 0.95 required
- F4 Clarity: ΔS ≤ 0 (entropy reduction)
- F5 Peace²: Harm potential rejection
- F9 Ethics: C_dark < 0.30
- F12 Defense: Injection protection
- F13 Sovereign: Human override always possible

## MCP Runtime (Live)
The arifOS MCP server at mcp.arif-fazil.com exposes:
- 13 canonical tools (000_init through 999_vault + gateway + sabar + forge)
- 11 metabolic prompts
- 3 organ context resources
- Live health endpoint: /health
- Interactive playground: /#playground

### Extended Capabilities (Modes within 13-tool surface)
- 111_SENSE mode=vision: Image understanding via MiniMax MCP
- 222_WITNESS mode=search: Live web search via MiniMax MCP (Earth/External witness)
- Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6: Primary LLM inference
- SEA-LION Gemma-v4-27B-IT: Fallback LLM inference

## Evidence Classification
All claims on this site use geoscience evidence tiers:
- OBS: Observable/verified
- DER: Derived from evidence
- INT: Interpretive
- SPEC: Speculative

## Governance Principles
1. DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Intelligence is forged, not given
2. Evidence over narrative — Ground claims in data before acting
3. Human sovereignty is real — Arif holds final veto on irreversible actions

## Federation Constellation
- arif-fazil.com: Human anchor (this site)
- mcp.arif-fazil.com: MCP gateway with live playground
- apex.arif-fazil.com: Constitutional canon and theory
- geox.arif-fazil.com: Earth grounding for subsurface decisions
- waw.arif-fazil.com: Wealth-as-Wisdom governance
- forge.arif-fazil.com: Operational hub
- wiki.arif-fazil.com: Knowledge base
